title: polypodium germanianum var. hydrophilum
intro: Polypodium germanianum var. hydrophilum, also known as the water-loving polypody fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Polypodium germanianum var. hydrophilum include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in the form of a topical cream or ointment to treat various skin conditions.
